g.title: ExecuteUbergraph_W_Tutorial_Spaceball__111
g.text: SourceString = Playing <bold>Space Ball</> is a lot of <bold>fun</>! Pick up the <bold>goals</>, set up the field, and start playing!Hold <Use/> to <bold>Pick Up</> the SpaceballPress <Fire/> to <bold>Shoot</> the SpaceballPress <Mine/> to <bold>Chip</> the Spaceball
